pitch.title: Chrono-Heist
pitch.core_theme: The ridiculous nature of greed and the comedic inevitability of consequence.
pitch.logline: A team of bumbling thieves uses a malfunctioning time machine to rob banks exactly one second before they are robbed by rival gangs, but their actions begin to hilariously unravel the fabric of the multiverse.
pitch.synopsis:
Act 1: Master thief Jax discovers a prototype temporal displacement device. He assembles a quirky crew to execute the ultimate lazy crime: stealing from other thieves mid-heist by jumping back just one second so they do the heavy lifting.

Act 2: The crew successfully pulls off several impossible jobs, becoming wealthy but drawing the attention of a highly bureaucratic temporal policing agency. As they push the limits of the device, reality begins to splinter, causing them to face absurd alternate versions of themselves.

Act 3: Jax must clumsily betray his crew to destroy the machine, sacrificing his own existence to reset the timeline and save the universe from collapsing into a hilarious paradox.
